title: Atletico consider Garnacho move - Wednesday's gossip
content:
Mirror back page

Guardian back page

Mail back page

Star back page

i back page

1 of 5

Atletico Madrid weigh up a January move for Alejandro Garnacho, Manchester United in advanced discussions over a new deal with Amad Diallo, Claudio Ranieri says Paulo Dybala can leave Roma.

Atletico Madridare considering a January move forManchester Unitedand Argentina winger Alejandro Garnacho, 20.(Fichajes - in Spanish),external

Manchester Unitedare in advanced negotiations to renew the contract of 22-year-old Ivory Coast winger Amad Diallo, whose current deal expires next summer.(ESPN),external

Romaboss Claudio Ranieri says Argentina forward Paulo Dybala, 31, can leave the club if he is not happy, after his agent met withGalatasaray.(Corriere dello Sport - in Italian),external

Manchester Unitedcould fight Bundesliga sideRB Leipzigto signParis St-Germainand France forward Randal Kolo Muani, 26, on loan in January.(Football Insider),external

Chelsea,Aston Villa,StuttgartandNewcastleare interested in PAOK and Greece Under-21 international forward Stefanos Tzimas, 18 who has impressed on loan atNurnberg.(ESPN),external

Get the latest from your Premier League club

Listen to the latest Football Daily podcast

Talks remain ongoing betweenSouthamptonandSheffield Wednesday'sGerman boss Danny Rohl over the managerial vacancy at St Mary's.(Sky Germany),external

Saintsare also consideringWest Bromhead coach Carlos Corberan as a candidate.(Sky Sports),external

West Hamhave been scoutingFreiburg's22-year-old German goalkeeper Noah Atubolu.(Fabrizio Romano),external

Burnleyare in advanced talks to sign Peru right-back Oliver Sonne, 24, fromSilkeborgin a deal worth Â£2.5m.(Football Insider),external

Former Birmingham City and Millwallboss Gary Rowett is in advanced talks withOxford Unitedover their managerial vacancy.(John Percy/Telegraph),external

Barcelonahave warned both Uruguay defender Ronald Araujo, 25, and Dutch midfielder Frenkie de Jong, 27, to sign new deals at the club or face the prospect of being transfer-listed. (Sport - in Spanish,external)

Evertonare monitoring 22-year-oldRangersand Morocco striker Hamza Igamane, with the futures of both England forward Dominic Calvert-Lewin, 27, and Portuguese striker Beto, 26, at the club unclear. (TBR Football,external)

Juventusare plotting a move forFeyenoordand Slovakia defender David Hancko, 27, as the Italian side look to shore up their backline. (Calciomercato - in Italian,external)
